info.title: SmartRecruiters API
info.description: SmartRecruiters Talent Acquisition Suite REST API providing access to jobs, candidates, postings, applications, interviews, assessments, configuration, events, messages, approvals, audit, and more.

post.description: Submits a new application for a posting

get.description: Returns configuration for a posting's apply form
Returns the status of a candidate application
Returns comments for an approval request

post.description: Adds a comment to an approval request
Creates a candidate in the talent pool
Parses resume and creates a candidate

put.description: Updates the status of a candidate

get.description: Returns screening answers for a candidate

post.description: Assigns a candidate to a job

post.summary: Add candidate to job from resume

post.description: Parses a resume without creating a candidate

get.description: Returns latest approval for a job

post.description: Creates a position for a job

get.description: Returns job ads for a job
Returns publications for a job ad
Returns the hiring team for a job

post.description: Adds a member to the hiring team

get.description: Returns the note for a job

put.description: Updates the note for a job

post.description: Creates a timeslot for an interview

get.description: Returns values for a job property
Returns assessment orders for an application
